mapper.select: SELECT so.store_id AS storeId, s.store_name AS storeName, SUM(so.total_amount) AS totalRevenue, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM t_sales_order so LEFT JOIN t_store s ON so.store_id = s.id WHERE so.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND so.deleted = 0 AND so.order_time >= #{startDate} AND so.order_time < DATE_ADD(#{endDate}, INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY so.store_id, s.store_name ORDER BY totalRevenue DESC LIMIT #{topN}
